description: Azure FinOps MCP: cost, budgets, forecasting and optimization for Claude, VS Code and Cursor.
name: io.github.raviteja-pegata/azure-finops-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated list of Azure subscription IDs this server may query
environmentVariables.name: AZURE_ALLOWED_SUBSCRIPTIONS

environmentVariables.description: Default subscription ID used when none is specified in a query (must be in AZURE_ALLOWED_SUBSCRIPTIONS)
environmentVariables.name: AZURE_DEFAULT_SUBSCRIPTION

environmentVariables.description: TTL for cost query cache in seconds (default: 900)
environmentVariables.name: FINOPS_CACHE_TTL_SECONDS

title: Azure FinOps MCP Server
